name: OGE Energy Corp.
description: OGE Energy Corp. is a major energy company headquartered in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma. Through its primary subsidiary, Oklahoma Gas and Electric Company (OG&E), it generates, transmits, distributes, and sells electric energy to customers across Oklahoma and western Arkansas. The company operates a diverse portfolio of power generation assets, including coal-fired, natural gas-fired, wind-powered, and solar-powered facilities. As a publicly traded utility holding company, OGE Energy focuses on providing reliable electricity services while investing in grid modernization, renewable energy integration, and sustainable infrastructure to meet the evolving energy needs of the communities it serves.
